GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT RPRW MUST PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO ALL DISCOVERY AT ISSUE ON THIS MOTION AND PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS TO LIBERTY INSURANCE OF $1,050 NO LATER THAN TEN DAYS AFTER SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF LIBERTY INSURANCE CORPORATION AS SUBROGEE OF ZACH ZACHARIAN & SUZANNA KHATCHATRIAN's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery; Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Order submitted.
